main.prompt_resolved:

The darkness entrance beckons {catname} to explore it.

{catname} enters the cave.

{He} follows the cave downwards, squeezing through crevices and traveling deeper within...

main.prompt_resolved:
{catname} finds a large pit full of tar.

It has a terribly pungent smell like rotting eggs.

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} gracefully sprints over the tar pits without getting stuck.

It gives the party an opportunity to ambush the next battle!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} navigates around the tar pit to the other side.

rare.prompt_resolved:

main.prompt_resolved: {catname} finds a huge nest full of enormous eggs!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname}'s teeth crunch through the brittle shell of the eggs, releasing a delicious nectar within!

rare.prompt_resolved: The cats devour the large and delicious eggs!
